title: Test Foolish Tricks: 086-E02 FORCE_SUMMON_FROM_HAND

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Your opponent must return their primary creature and all of their magic cards on the field back to their hand. Your opponent must summon an AL 6 or lower creature to the field.

plan.title: Test Foolish Tricks: 086-E02 FORCE_SUMMON_FROM_HAND
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Foolish Tricks and verify that 086-E02 FORCE_SUMMON_FROM_HAND resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

notes: Rules text: opponent returns their primary creature and all field magic to hand, then must summon an AL 6 or lower creature.
Give Player 2 an AL 6 or lower creature in hand as the forced summon candidate.

steps: Player 1 plays Foolish Tricks from hand.
Return Player 2 primary creature and field magic to hand.
Resolve the forced summon prompt by choosing the AL 6 or lower creature from Player 2 hand.

expectedAssertions.label: Forced AL 6 or lower summon resolved
Opponent primary became the forced AL 6 candidate

manualVerification: Confirm the returned primary is in the opponent hand before the forced summon resolves.
riskNotes: Parsed effect is marked needsReview; validate card data before trusting test result.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
